reasoning: Refund approved due to damaged item claim. Order notes indicate the customer has an excellent 18‑month history with 15 prior orders totaling $2,340, zero previous refund requests, and this is their first complaint. Internal staff note explicitly recommends approving the refund and following up on a potential product quality issue. Given the strong customer track record and reasonable claim, approving the $101.00 refund is appropriate.
